title: Full Front Yard Makeover
description:
Check out a few satisfying before and afters that show revealing edges, shaping and reclaiming a client's sophisticated and tranquil space.

Send us an email if you would like to establish, maintain or design a garden layout at your kāinga (home).
Kia pai tō wiki koutou!

title: Grass Restoration
description:
Want your grass to be lush and healthy?

Autumn is grass growing season. I can help you stay on top of your lawns and keep them weed free and green.

title: Garden Cleanup & Restoration
description:
Mahi has been busy and for that I am grateful.

This project involved a full garden clear out, tree removal, driveway cleanup, and redefining garden borders. These before and afters show the transformation across multiple areas of the property.
Kia pai tō wiki!

title: Tree Maintenance
description: I have the privilege of maintaining this beautiful garden. I enjoy the concept, structure, and the opportunity to showcase attention to detail.

title: Tropical Garden Design
description:
My client had a vision for a tropical feel in this space.

Starting with clearing and planning, I developed a thoughtful layout. With over a year of regular maintenance and care, the space has really flourished.
These images show the transformation from planting through to a well-established garden.
Have a vision? We can help bring it to life.

title: Yard Clearing
description:
Have a jungle growing in your yard?

Get in touch. I can tidy things up, get your garden back under control, and provide regular maintenance.
